results.rendered_html:
abhyarṇa 1〉 adj. nahe  P. 7,2,25 .  VOP. 26,111 .  AK. 3,2,17 .  H. 1534 . 1451 .  RAGH. 2,32 .  BHAṬṬ. 3,28 . kālo 'bhyarṇajalāgamaḥ  SĀH. D. 65,8 .
— 2〉 n. Nähe: abhyarṇavartin  KATHĀS. 25,71 . — Von ar mit abhi; nach  P. 7,2,25 . von ard; vgl. apārṇa entfernt.

results.rendered_html:
abhyarṇa a. [abhi-ard-kta,  P. VII. 2. 25   Sk. ] Near, proximate, adjoining, being close or near (of space); approaching, drawing near (of time); abhyarṇamāgaskṛtamaspṛśadbhiḥ  R. 2. 32 ; āśrama˚ bhūmiḥ  U. 4 ;  Mu. 6 ;  K. 69 , 125 , 208 , 286 ;  Māl. 5. 13 ;  Ratn. 3. 10 ,  Bk. 3. 28. 
— rṇaṃ Proximity, vicinity; aṃdhakāriṇi vanābhyarṇe kimudbhrāmyati  Gīt. 7 ; abhyarṇe parirabhya nirbharabharaḥ premāṃdhayā rādhayā  Gīt. 1 ,  Śi. 3. 21.
